parsedJSON.summary: Full-stack engineer with 7+ years building and operating production systems across real-time infrastructure and applied AI. Experienced in Python, TypeScript, Next.js, React, and modern LLM-powered systems. Specializes in Kubernetes-based infrastructure for GPU-backed inference and low-latency streaming services with a focus on reliability under real traffic.

experience.description: Architected and shipped a production real-time conversational intelligence platform. Achieved ~75% classification accuracy. Built GPU accelerated distributed inference services with dynamic batching, INT8 quantization, and autoscaling.
Developed modular UI components using Next.js, React, and GraphQL. Improved initial load times by 35%. Built internal analytics tools with NumPy, Pandas, Jupyter, and Python.
Built custom TensorFlow ops for DPU Compiler. Developed neural networks for audio and vision classification. Built full-stack admin tools with Node.js, React, and GraphQL.

ats_recommendations: Ensure all key skills are mentioned in the job experience section.
Include more industry-specific keywords related to AI and infrastructure.
Provide quantifiable achievements in all roles.
